2026-06-29::dinner.name: Ground Beef Pasta with Spaghetti Sauce
2026-06-29::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs cooked ground beef, jar spaghetti sauce, canned diced tomatoes, rotini pasta, shredded cheese
2026-06-29::dinner.note: Uses cooked ground beef; quick weeknight dinner

2026-06-30::dinner.name: Brined Roast Chicken with Roasted Sweet Potatoes and Green Beans
2026-06-30::dinner.protein: whole chicken (rotisserie stand-in or raw chicken brined)
2026-06-30::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs raw chicken, kosher salt, sugar, garlic, sweet potatoes, fresh green beans, olive oil, seasoning

2026-07-01::dinner.name: Cajun Sausage with Wild Rice and Sautéed Mixed Vegetables
2026-07-01::dinner.ingredients: 4 Cajun sausages (frozen), parboiled rice, frozen mixed vegetables, butter, garlic, seasoning
2026-07-01::dinner.note: Date night — kids eat simple; easy prep

2026-07-02::dinner.name: Chicken Fried Rice with Frozen Corn
2026-07-02::dinner.ingredients: rotisserie chicken shredded, parboiled rice, eggs, frozen corn, green bell pepper, soy sauce, sesame oil, carrots
2026-07-02::dinner.note: Thursday lifting day; higher-carb rice meal

2026-07-03::dinner.name: Spinach Pie (Frozen Crust) with Caesar Salad
2026-07-03::dinner.ingredients: two pie crusts (frozen), frozen spinach, eggs, shredded cheese, white onion, romaine lettuce, Caesar dressing
2026-07-03::dinner.note: Friday meatless; uses both pie crusts

2026-07-04::dinner.name: Fourth of July Hamburgers with French Fries and Pork and Beans
2026-07-04::dinner.ingredients: 4 hamburger patties, hamburger buns, shredded cheese, romaine lettuce, fridge french fries, canned pork and beans, green bell pepper
2026-07-04::dinner.note: Independence Day cookout; festive and simple

2026-07-05::dinner.name: Ziplock Buffet — Leftover Spread with Rice and Canned Vegetables
2026-07-05::dinner.ingredients: all dinner leftovers of the week, parboiled rice, canned green beans, canned sweet peas, sourdough bread
2026-07-05::dinner.note: Sunday leftover buffet; clear fridge before Monday

2026-07-06::dinner.name: Lentil Soup with Sourdough Bread
2026-07-06::dinner.ingredients: red lentils, canned diced tomatoes, carrots, white onion, cumin, garlic, olive oil, sourdough bread
2026-07-06::dinner.note: Legume anchor meal; batch for week lunches
